summary: Okta SSO integration testing complete. All 19 backend API tests pass. Frontend shows all 3 SSO buttons (Auth0, Okta, Enterprise SSO). Okta callback route renders correctly. Email/password login still works. Auth0 endpoints still function properly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Okta SSO integration fully tested alongside existing Auth0 SSO. Backend generates correct Okta authorization URLs with /oauth2/default/v1/authorize path. Callback validates state/code parameters correctly. SSO session is created in MongoDB when okta/login is called. Frontend has both Auth0 button (data-testid=auth0-login-button) and Okta button (data-testid=okta-login-button). /auth/okta/callback route renders OktaCallback component with proper error handling. GET /api/sso/providers returns both Auth0 and Okta as configured. Email/password login unaffected.

okta_login_endpoint.details: Returns auth_url with correct Okta domain, client_id=0oa110btli7AyC2ZB698, response_type=code, scope=openid profile email, /oauth2/default/v1/authorize path, state parameter

okta_callback_validation.details: Returns 400 for missing code/state, returns 400 for invalid state

sso_providers_endpoint.details: Lists both Auth0 and Okta as configured providers

sso_session_creation.details: SSO session is created in MongoDB when okta/login is called (verified by callback returning 401 instead of 400 for valid state)

frontend_okta_button.details: Button renders with 'Sign in with Okta' text

frontend_auth0_button.details: Button renders with 'Sign in with Auth0' text

frontend_okta_callback_page.details: OktaCallback component renders correctly with error handling

note_on_okta_token_exchange: Actual Okta token exchange cannot be tested end-to-end without real Okta browser login flow, but all URL generation, parameter validation, session creation, and error handling are verified working
